question_text: Two identical plastic spheres are both given the same type of static charge by rubbing them with wool. What will happen when they are brought close together?

options.label: A
options.text: They will attract each other strongly

options.label: C
options.text: They will have no effect on each other

options.label: D
options.text: They will neutralise each other immediately

explanation: Like charges repel each other. Since both spheres received the same type of charge (both gained or both lost electrons), they have the same charge and will push away from each other.
